title: PARENTING CLASSES - 211info
text: OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES PORTLAND PARENTING CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community-based parenting classes to support parents in navigating parenthood, managing child behaviors, and connecting with other parents. 11010 SE Division Street Suite 202 Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Ages 0-14 and their parents or caregivers Hours: No standard hours (503) 335-5975 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 335-5975 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Some classes may require referral from a therapist. FEES: Varies by class DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas, Lane, Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties Services: Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING APPROACHES - MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING AND PSYCHIATRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES MUTUAL SUPPORT - KEEP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
